message:
feat(cli): --robot-overlay command for agent-initiated human handoff, session agent type counts

Two CLI additions:

1. Robot overlay command (root.go):
   - New --robot-overlay flag opens dashboard overlay for a session
   - --overlay-cursor for attention item focus
   - --overlay-no-wait to return immediately without waiting for dismissal
   - Calls robot.PrintOverlay(OverlayOptions{}) and returns JSON status
   - Supports agent-initiated human handoff (br-a6cmp)

2. Session agent type counts (session.go):
   - buildStatusResponse() and runStatusOnce() now count Cursor,
     Windsurf, and Aider agents alongside Claude, Codex, Gemini
   - AgentCountsResponse struct gains Cursor, Windsurf, Aider fields
   - Status display shows counts for each new agent type with Robot icon
   - totalAgents calculation includes all agent types
   - Fix format string alignment (reset code placement) in directory
     and pane count lines
   - Unknown agent types now show Robot icon instead of User icon

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
